kg por lado que no salen con discos está: kg per side that don't come out with standard plates — that's the nearest reachable weight below.
Hazlo siempre, no es opcional con tu lum: Always do it, not optional with your lower back. Slow bird-dogs and dead bugs, bracing your core as if about to take a punch: they teach the core to stabilise the spine.
5 min, ritmo cómodo, subir temperatura: 5 min, comfortable pace, raise body temperature

Dead bug x8 por lado, bird-dog x8 por la: Dead bug x8 per side, bird-dog x8 per side (slow)
También de viaje el calentamiento es obl: Even when travelling the warm-up is mandatory: your lower back travels with you. Everything is done on the room floor.
Marcha en el sitio o jumping jacks suave: Marching in place or gentle jumping jacks
x12, aprieta arriba 2 s: x12, squeeze at the top for 2 s
Si el mini-gym tiene bici o cinta, 5 min: If the mini-gym has a bike or treadmill, 5 easy min count as the first step. Your lower back travels with you.
Cardio suave o marcha en el sitio: Easy cardio or marching in place
Cualquier dolor punzante, hormigueo o do: Any sharp pain, tingling or pain radiating to the leg = stop and return to the no-barbell version. Mild muscle tension after exercise = normal.
10 min elíptica o cinta inclinada en zon: 10 min elliptical or incline treadmill in zone 2
10 min bici suave para drenar piernas: 10 min easy bike to flush the legs

Anti-rotación, clave para tu lumbar: Anti-rotation, key for your lower back

Pies a la altura del pecho, no muy abajo: Feet at chest height, not too low
Si haces dominadas libres, bájalas a 5 r: If doing unassisted pull-ups, drop to 5 reps

Pie atrás en banco, foco glúteo: Rear foot on bench, glute focus
